content.en:
Soon after, Ye Tian left from Ploz.

Subsequently, he was going to take a trip to the Endless Spaceline, mainly to see it.

Airplanes!!!!

The countless ultimate space-time particle turmoil also made Ye Tian's body gradually break away from the abyss of Aromu.

......

Beyond the Abyss of Aromu.

Ye Tian stepped into the endless space-time line, which was filled with endless ultimate space-time particles, and his entire body seemed to be integrated into this endless space-time line.

However, he still carried it with his strong strength.

And he also sensed the space-time bubble of the Abyss of Aromu, and also vaguely sensed other space-time bubbles.

There seems to be a lot of space-time bubbles in this endless space-time line.

These space-time bubbles definitely contain great secrets, but he is just a top-level ancient demon-level powerhouse, and it is impossible for him to know too many secrets if he has not broken through to the ultimate ancient demon realm, and he cannot study the space-time bubbles.

"It's almost time, I can't stay in the endless planeline for too long, or I'll be blended in. "

So, Ye Tian immediately returned.

After coming back, Ye Tian silently cultivated for a long time afterward, occasionally inquiring about the news of the Huoxi space-time battlefield and the main department of the Aluo Mother. 630

With his current strength, many top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses are willing to befriend him, and even some peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses will communicate with him.

After all, as long as he doesn't fall, he will definitely be able to become the most powerful peak ancient demon-level powerhouse in the future.

To befriend him is to befriend a future peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, and it is not an ordinary peak ancient demon-level powerhouse like Proz, but a truly almost invincible peak ancient demon-level powerhouse.

Therefore, with the passage of time, Ye Tian's reputation also resounded in the abyss of Aromu, except for the main department of Aromu, other top tribes knew about Ye Tian's existence.

......

The Abyss of Arromu, a remote place.

A group of ancient demon-level powerhouses from the Golden God Department sat in a large hall, led by the pinnacle ancient demon-level powerhouse, the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon.

At this time, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon was in a very bad mood.

"Lord Jin Slayer Ancient Demon, it is said that the Heaven of the Eagle Department has broken through to the top Ancient Demon level powerhouse, and the other party's growth speed is too fast!"

The Golden Slaughter Ancient Demon also followed: "Yes, there is still a lot of hatred between our Golden God Department and the sky, he has killed many of us emperor-level, even if we don't chase (abda), but the other party will definitely want to kill us in the future." If he waited for him to break through to the peak of the Ancient Demon level powerhouse, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon Lord was afraid that he would not be his opponent. "

The Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon did not refute, he admitted that once Ye Tian broke through to the peak Ancient Demon level realm, he would definitely not be an opponent.

Ye Tian's record in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, he also knew that he was truly invincible at the same level, and even Amusha was not Ye Tian's opponent.

This kind of strong man is too demonic, and he is truly invincible at the same level.

"You want me to assassinate the Eagle Heaven?"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon asked.

"Yes, he must be killed, otherwise our Golden God Department will be destroyed at his hands in the future. The Red Ancient Demon said.

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon also wanted to kill Ye Tian, but the main department of the Luo Mother had an order that the ancient demon-level powerhouses were not allowed to kill each other, otherwise it would anger the main department of the Luo Mother.

Compared to the main department of the mother of Aluo, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon is just an ant.

"Lord Jin Slayer Ancient Demon, I know that you are worried about the order of the Luo Mother's main department, but the Luo Mother main department only said that in the abyss of the Luo Mother, the ancient demon-level powerhouses are not allowed to kill each other, but there is one place where the ancient demon-level powerhouses are allowed to kill. The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon said.

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon instantly understood what the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon was talking about.

It was indeed not the Huoxi Space-Time Battlefield, after all, the Huoxi Space-Time Battlefield did not allow peak ancient demon-level powerhouses to enter, unless he used the Ultimate Space-Time Treasure Leaf, but he couldn't get the Ultimate Space-Time Treasure Leaf!

So, that place can only be - the realm of the Friction!

The realm of the Destruction is the place where the Golden God Department rises, and the Golden Extermination Ancient Demon has gained a great opportunity in the Realm of Destruction, thus breaking through to the peak of the ancient demon level.

However, after all, the realm of Destruction is attached to the abyss of Aromu, and it is still controlled by the main department of Aromu.

The Realm of Destruction is very special, even the main department of Arrow Mother cannot control the Realm of Destruction, and you must need the Stone of Destruction to enter.

And the Rubbing Stone is too rare, too rare, even the main department of Arrow Mother is not much, but the next Rubbing Realm is about to open.

At that time, as long as you hold the Friction Stone, you can enter the Realm of Friction and obtain the great opportunity in it.

The Realm Red Ancient Demon said again: "Lord Jin Annihilation Ancient Demon, the realm of Destruction contains many great opportunities, after all, Tian is not an ancient demon-level powerhouse in the main department of Luo Mu, if he wants to obtain opportunities, he must rely on himself, such opportunities, he will definitely not give up." "

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon understood, "Do you want me to trade a Destruction Stone to the Heavens?"

"Yes!" Jie Chi Ying said: "Our Golden God Department has two Friction Stones, our strength is too weak, and only the Golden Extermination Ancient Demon Master is suitable to enter, and the other one is redundant, it can be traded to the sky, as long as he enters, the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon Lord can kill the Heaven in the Friction Realm!"

"This is indeed a solution, and it is my only chance to kill the heavens at the moment!"

However, how to trade with Ye Tian, if you go directly to the door, it will inevitably be too purposeful.

"I'll go!" the Realm Red Ancient Demon said, "I can say that the cause and effect are concluded with the heavens, and he shouldn't suspect anything." "

"Alright, then let's do it!" agreed.

......

Eagle Ministry.

this day.

The Realm Red Ancient Demon came to visit Ye Tian, which shocked the emperors of the Eagle Division.

After all, the Eagle Department and the Golden God Department have a grudge, but the Realm Red Ancient Demon came to visit Ye Tian, which was too unexpected.

However, Ye Tian still met the Realm Red Ancient Demon.

"I've seen the Ancient Demon of the Heavens!"

The Realm Red Ancient Demon said very respectfully.

Although he was also a top Gu Demon-level powerhouse, he knew very well that Ye Tian could kill him in one move, and the two were not at the same level.

"Realm Red Ancient Demon, say it, find me something. Ye Tian asked.

The Boundary Red Ancient Demon said: "Lord Heavenly Ancient Demon, I want to settle the cause and effect with you on behalf of the Golden God Department. Forget about the past, there was not much hatred in the first place. "

"Ending cause and effect?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, could it be that the Golden God Department was afraid of him, so he wanted to reconcile.

He didn't answer immediately, which made the Boundary Red Ancient Demon couldn't help but take out something.

"Lord Heavenly Ancient Demon, I want to trade this treasure with you, which can be regarded as our sincerity. "

Realm Red Ancient Demon Dao.

"What is this?" Ye Tian didn't know the Stone of Destruction.
